title: Cobblemon : The Dawn region!
description: This is a datapack for cobblemon which adds fakemon that i created, the name of the region is the dawn region, it is not based on any country but is a really cool region with a lot of different fakemon!
body:
- ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fce4514968b8a86cfaad21a6b04f2657dbc17132.png)The dawn region is a fan region i made, with this pack you can bring my fakemon into your cobblemon adventure!  for now there are only the starter's but im planing to add a lot more like a rigonal zubat and even some cool fossil's! i hope you enjoy this pack!

- This is how to enable the starter's to show up as an option to pick . You need to change the false after exportstarterconfig in config/cobblemon/main.json to true, and then put starters.json in config/cobblemon.(After that, you need restart Minecraft.)![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08e41eeb41b0e6838842c99d73a6b4f8a95ca1a1_0.webp)
